impact: The supervisor currently stops the worker before applying a repair and restarts it afterward. Updating the daemon control path to include --revisit-blocked lets the restarted worker select the remaining blocked PP&D tasks and use existing failure context, instead of leaving the daemon with no eligible work and repeatedly triggering supervisor repair.
summary: Start PP&D worker runs with blocked-task revisit enabled.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-15: Add a bounded public crawl dry-run that fetches only a tiny seed set after robots/crawl-policy checks.; Task checkbox-17: Add append-only accepted-work ledger generation for successful PP&D daemon rounds.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
